headline: Procare Solutions Releases 2026 Child Care Business Trends Report
summary: Procare Solutions, a leader in child care management software, released our fourth annual Child Care Business Trends Report, offering a detailed look at the challenges and opportunities shaping early childhood education in the year ahead. The report draws on survey responses from nearly 5,000 early childhood education professionals and usage data from nearly 40,000 child care centers.

headline: Illumia Unveils New Brand Identity at Momentum Conference, Announces 2026 Distinction Award Winners
summary: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz., March 04, 2026--Illumia unveiled its new brand identity at Momentum ’26 and announced 2026 Distinction Award winners across higher education and healthcare.
